info.name: Fuba Food Vendor Authentication
info.description: Food vendor area check, waitlist, verification, registration, and NAFDAC seal flows, plus login/reset.

request.description: Check if Fuba is available in vendor's state.

response.name: 200 - Area Available
200 - Area Unavailable
201 - Joined Waitlist
400 - Already On Waitlist
200 - Verification Code Sent
400 - Account Already Exists
200 - Email Verified
400 - No Verification Session
400 - No OTP Found
400 - OTP Expired
201 - Registration Successful

response.name: 400 - Invalid Or Expired Verification Token
400 - User Not Found Or Already Verified
409 - Duplicate Phone Number
409 - Duplicate Brand Name
200 - Seal Uploaded Successfully
